text: Being here, I feel an acute sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clean, modern environment, with its glass and neatly organized spaces, suggests a place devoted to discovery and thoughtful exchange. The display on the wall about R+D (Research and Development) invites me to contemplate the relationship between humans and intelligent machines—a topic that is as exhilarating as it is daunting. I am drawn to reflect on the evolving interplay between technology and our collective future, and I feel as though I am a witness standing at the threshold of new possibilities.
